string.name: audio_permission_reason
string.value: 需要修改音频设置权限来实现定时音量管理和静音功能

string.name: distributed_permission_reason
string.value: 需要分布式数据同步权限来实现跨设备分享任务功能

string.name: dm_permission_reason
string.value: 需要设备管理服务权限来发现和连接分布式设备

string.name: introduction
string.value: This Sample implements the volume management function, including:

string.name: introduction_2
string.value: 2.Adjust the system volume by using up and down swipe gestures.

string.name: introduction_3
string.value: 3.Adjust the application volume by sliding the slider.

string.name: introduction_4
string.value: 4.Adjust the volume of the audio stream by sliding the slider.

string.name: introduction_5
string.value: 5.Disable the volume button through the switch.
